splits.title: Home Courses - The Significance of Playgrounds in the Community Life
splits.start_boundary: Home Courses. THE SIGNIFICANCE OF PLAYGROUNDS

files.notes: This file contains two distinct lesson sections: a genealogy lesson on Welsh surnames and a home course lesson on playgrounds. The genealogy lesson ends with questions, and the home course lesson begins immediately after with a clear heading change.
